sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8781" key="a)nqo/bolos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνθό-βολος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8781.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">garlanded with flowers,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θρίξ</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.270</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Marc. Arg.), but codd. have <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀνθοβόλον,</foreign> i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shedding flowers.</tr_> </sense> </entryFree>
